title: Notifications and Monitoring
description: Monitoring systems receive snapshot lifecycle and progress notifications via Kafka (sink), JMX, or log channels. NotificationService routes Notification objects to all enabled channels.

actors.name: Connector/Pipeline
actors.description: Debezium connector engine that triggers snapshot events and calls notification services

actors.name: Kafka Consumer / Monitoring System
actors.description: Downstream system consuming SourceRecords from the sink notification topic (io.debezium.notification)

actors.name: JMX Client
actors.description: JMX management tool or monitoring agent subscribing to JmxNotificationChannel MXBean

actors.name: Log Aggregator
actors.description: Log monitoring system reading SLF4J log output prefixed with [Notification Service]

actors.name: Administrator
actors.description: Configures enabled notification channels via connector config (notification.enabled.channels)

use_cases.name: Configure Notification Channels
use_cases.description: Set enabled channels in CommonConnectorConfig. NotificationService.init() calls channel.init(config) for each enabled channel; ConnectChannel.initConnectChannel(schemaFactory, consumer) for sink channels.

use_cases.name: Notify Initial Snapshot Table In Progress
Notify Initial Snapshot Table Chunk Progress
use_cases.description: notifyTableChunkInProgress(partition, offsetContext, collection, chunkIndex, totalChunks, totalRowsScanned) → notify(type='TABLE_CHUNK_IN_PROGRESS', data: chunk_index, total_chunks, total_rows_scanned)

use_cases.name: Notify Initial Snapshot Table Completed
use_cases.description: notifyCompletedTableSuccessfully / notifyCompletedTableWithError → notify(type='TABLE_SCAN_COMPLETED', data: scanned_collection, status=SUCCEEDED|SQL_EXCEPTION, [total_rows_scanned, data_collections])

use_cases.name: Notify Incremental Snapshot Started
use_cases.description: IncrementalSnapshotNotificationService.notifyStarted(context, partition, offsetContext) → notify(aggregateType='Incremental Snapshot', type='STARTED', data: data_collections, connector_name)

use_cases.name: Notify Incremental Snapshot In Progress
use_cases.description: notifyInProgress → notify(type='IN_PROGRESS', data: data_collections, current_collection_in_progress, maximum_key, last_processed_key)

use_cases.name: Notify Incremental Snapshot Table Scan Completed
use_cases.description: notifyTableScanCompleted(context, partition, offsetContext, totalRowsScanned, TableScanCompletionStatus) → notify(type='TABLE_SCAN_COMPLETED', data: scanned_collection, data_collections, total_rows_scanned, status)

use_cases.name: Receive Notification via Log Channel
use_cases.description: LogNotificationChannel.send(notification) → LOGGER.info('[Notification Service] {}', notification.toString()). Channel name='log'.

use_cases.name: Receive Notification via Kafka Sink Channel
use_cases.description: SinkNotificationChannel.send(notification, offsets) builds SourceRecord (keySchema: NotificationKey, valueSchema: Notification with id/type/aggregate_type/additional_data/timestamp), puts to configured topic via BlockingConsumer<SourceRecord> → ChangeEventQueue. Channel name='sink'.

use_cases.name: Receive Notification via JMX
use_cases.description: JmxNotificationChannel.send(notification) stores in notifications list + calls sendNotification(JMX Notification[type='debezium.notification', userData=notification.toJson()]). MXBean registered at management/notifications. Channel name='jmx'.

use_cases.name: Query Stored JMX Notifications
use_cases.description: JmxNotificationChannelMXBean.getNotifications() returns List<Notification>. JmxNotificationChannelMXBean.reset() clears notification list.

use_cases.name: Stop Notification Service
use_cases.description: NotificationService.stop() → calls close() on all enabled channels. JmxNotificationChannel.close() unregisters MXBean.

key_classes.name: LogNotificationChannel
key_classes.behavior: Logs notification via SLF4J INFO with prefix '[Notification Service]'

key_classes.name: SinkNotificationChannel
key_classes.behavior: Builds SourceRecord and pushes to ChangeEventQueue via BlockingConsumer; topic configured via notification.sink.topic.name

key_classes.name: JmxNotificationChannel
key_classes.behavior: Stores notifications in list, broadcasts JMX notifications of type 'debezium.notification'; MXBean registered at management/notifications

key_relationships: JmxNotificationChannel extends NotificationBroadcasterSupport implements NotificationChannel + JmxNotificationChannelMXBean
NotificationService filters channels by enabledChannels list from CommonConnectorConfig
important_notes: Enabled channels are configured via CommonConnectorConfig.getEnabledNotificationChannels() — filter key for routing
ConnectChannel receives Offsets<P,O> in send() for Kafka SourceRecord partition/offset metadata
notify(Notification) sends to all enabled channels with empty offsets for ConnectChannel
notify(Notification, Offsets) splits: non-ConnectChannel gets basic send(), ConnectChannel gets send(notification, offsets)
IncrementalSnapshotNotificationService uses correlationId from context as notification id (falls back to UUID)
SinkNotificationChannel requires notification.sink.topic.name config — validated at startup
JmxNotificationChannel stores all notifications in-memory list, accessible via getNotifications() MXBean operation
NotificationServiceTest validates: log channel writes to SLF4J, sink channel produces correct SourceRecord to consumer
